narrative.summary:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗦𝗣𝗔𝗖𝗘

West Chelsea — one block from the High Line

You walk in and it's all lime-green bentwood chairs, orchids on every surface, a slatted wood ceiling that feels vaguely Scandinavian. The painting of a red tractor on the wall tells you this place takes its farm-to-table thing seriously. There's an energy here — people lingering over brunch, friends meeting for afternoon drinks before hitting the galleries.

blocks.title: Space
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗦𝗣𝗔𝗖𝗘

West Chelsea — one block from the High Line

You walk in and it's all lime-green bentwood chairs, orchids on every surface, a slatted wood ceiling that feels vaguely Scandinavian. The painting of a red tractor on the wall tells you this place takes its farm-to-table thing seriously. There's an energy here — people lingering over brunch, friends meeting for afternoon drinks before hitting the galleries.

blocks.title: Drinks
blocks.body:
𝗗𝗥𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦

🍹 The weekend essentials:
• BLT Mary — $18 (bacon, olives, celery salt rim) ⭐
• Mimosa — $14
• Cantaloupe Cooler (mocktail) — $10
• Bloody Maria — $18

This is a brunch-drinks destination. The BLT Mary is the move — they skewer a strip of crispy bacon right in your drink.

blocks.title: Food
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗠𝗘𝗡𝗨

𝗕𝗥𝗨𝗡𝗖𝗛 (Sat-Sun) $16-26
• Raisin Walnut French Toast — $19 (seasonal fruit, almonds) ⭐
• Fried Egg Sandwich — $18 (jalapeño slaw, brioche)
• Cornmeal Pancakes — $17 (house butter, maple)
• Eggs Your Way — $16 (with toast)

𝗟𝗨𝗡𝗖𝗛 $19-28
• Gem Lettuce Salad — $23 (roast chicken, cucumber, tomato) ⭐
• Pan Bagnat — $19 (olive oil tuna, tomato, egg, olives)
• Cookshop Burger — $24 (cheddar, pickles, fries)
• Grilled Salmon — $28

𝗗𝗜𝗡𝗡𝗘𝗥 $26-42
• Wood-Roasted Half Chicken — $32 ⭐
• Hanger Steak — $38
• Whole Roasted Fish (market) — $42
• Seasonal Risotto — $26

𝗦𝗜𝗗𝗘𝗦 $9-14
• Spiced Fries — $12 ⭐
• Roasted Broccolini — $14
• Market Vegetables — $12

Note: Menu changes seasonally. Known for sourcing from local farms (Greenmarket adjacent).

blocks.title: Check
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗖𝗛𝗘𝗖𝗞

💰 $$$

Brunch for 2: $70-90 (with drinks)
Dinner for 2: $120-160 (with wine)

Reservations: Resy (recommended, especially weekends)
Walk-ins: Possible at the bar, especially weekday lunch

📞 (212) 924-4440
🌐 cookshopny.com
📸 @cookshopnyc

𝗛𝗢𝗨𝗥𝗦
Mon: 4:30pm – 11pm (dinner only)
Tue-Fri: 12pm – 3:30pm, 4:30pm – 11pm
Sat: 10am – 3:30pm, 4:30pm – 11pm
Sun: 10am – 3:30pm (brunch only)

𝗕𝗘𝗦𝗧 𝗧𝗜𝗠𝗘𝗦
• Weekday lunch (12-2pm) — quiet, easy to get a table
• Saturday brunch early (10-11am) — before the High Line crowds descend
• Summer: sidewalk tables fill first, reserve ahead
• Post-gallery: Perfect pre-dinner stop after Chelsea galleries (Thu-Sat)

blocks.title: Travel Intel
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗥𝗔𝗩𝗘𝗟 𝗜𝗡𝗧𝗘𝗟

From: The Crosby Street Hotel, 79 Crosby St, New York, NY 10012, USA
To: 156 10th Avenue

• walking: 44 mins • 2.0 mi
• transit: 25 mins • 2.5 mi
• driving: 13 mins • 2.2 mi (traffic: 13 mins)

Best modality: DRIVING ⭐
Why: Fastest available option (13 mins)
